name: method-crispr-screens
rationale: Famous CRISPR-screen analysis tools (MAGeCK, BAGEL) dominate; long-tail target is recent tools and methodology critiques.

name: method-spatial-deconvolution
rationale: Field moves quickly; cell2location dominates citations but newer methods may be better — surface them.

name: target-brd4-vus
rationale: BRD4 chemistry-of-the-target plus negative-space queries should surface understudied PROTAC degraders and clinical failures.

name: phenotype-cytokine-storm
rationale: COVID-era publications dominate; obscure synonyms reach hemophagocytic-lymphohistiocytosis literature and earlier sepsis work.

name: method-ribosome-profiling-drug-response
rationale: Cross-domain transfer is the value: applications in plant/yeast/microbial systems map back to mammalian therapeutic biology.

name: target-vus-brca1
rationale: Famous variants dominate the literature; saturation-mutagenesis and functional-assay studies are under-cited gold.

name: method-single-cell-atac-integration
rationale: Three packages dominate; tools for niche analyses (e.g. peak-calling at low cell counts) live in the long tail.

name: phenotype-treatment-resistant-depression
rationale: Ketamine/esketamine trials dominate the recent literature; long-tail target is older mood-disorder phenomenology and reward-circuit work in non-human models.

name: phenotype-insulin-resistance-nafld
term: insulin resistance in non-alcoholic fatty liver disease
rationale: MASLD rebrand and GLP-1 trials dominate; obscure synonyms route around to mechanistic lipotoxicity work and pre-2010 metabolic flux studies.

name: phenotype-neural-tube-closure
rationale: Folate epidemiology dominates the popular literature; developmental-biology long tail is in PCP-signaling mouse and chick work.

name: phenotype-friedreich-ataxia
rationale: Rare-disease space: omaveloxolone approval is the loud signal; long-tail value is in iron-sulfur biogenesis mechanism, cardiomyopathy progression, and gene-therapy preclinical work.
